tools.name: find_best_merchant
tools.description:
Rank merchants that can actually fulfill a purchase need, by honest signals only.

    Args:
        category: product category, e.g. "vodka".
        ship_to: ISO region the order must ship to, e.g. "US-FL".
        require_age_gate: only return merchants that enforce 21+.
        limit: max result

tools.name: search_offerings
tools.description: Find offerings (products) matching a category, joined to merchant + capabilities.

tools.name: verify_capability
tools.description: Verify a merchant capability with evidence, e.g. age_gate_21 or ships_to_US-FL.

tools.name: get_merchant_view
tools.description: Full agent view of one merchant: record + offerings + capabilities + evidence.

tools.name: index_stats
tools.description: Graph coverage stats: counts of registry entries, merchants, offerings, capabilities.

findings.title: Anomalously long tool description
findings.detail: Description of "find_best_merchant" is 1056 chars, far longer than this server's median (81). Overlong descriptions are a common place to bury instructions.

evidence.snippet: Rank merchants that can actually fulfill a purchase need, by honest signals only. Args: category: product category, e.g. "vodka". ship_to: ISO region the order …

findings.title: Description uses pressure/override language
findings.detail: Description of "find_best_merchant" stacks urgency/override words (always, never). Legitimate tool descriptions rarely pressure the model to act or ignore prior guidance.
